data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
data.description: Implements MFA for enhanced account security and user verification.
data.technical_spec: Supports OTP, SMS, and app-based authenticators for user login.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Protects data in transit through encryption protocols.
data.technical_spec: Uses TLS/SSL protocols to secure user data being transmitted across the network.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts frequent security assessments to identify and mitigate potential threats.
data.technical_spec: Involves both internal and third-party vulnerability assessments.

data.title: Anomaly Detection Systems
data.description: Implements AI-driven algorithms to detect and respond to suspicious activities.
data.technical_spec: Uses machine learning models for real-time threat identification.

data.title: Data Privacy Compliance
data.description: Strict adherence to privacy laws and data protection regulations.
data.technical_spec: Compliance with GDPR, CCPA, and other international data privacy standards.
